full_text:
Xu Zhao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Zhaowas born in Yuhang in Zhejiang. Protected his former master Sheng Xiang and old friend White Tiger Yan, Sun Ce admired his loyalty. Xu Zhao was affiliated with Sheng Xian.
